scoring._summary: Analyzed 12 scored results across 1 scenario(s) and 4 condition(s). Top condition: shared-markdown (mean=88.1).

conditions._summary: 0/6 condition pairs significantly different after Holm-Bonferroni correction; 0/3 pairs vs 'baseline' are significant.

coordination.summary: Analyzed 144 sessions across 4 conditions. Overall engagement rate: 50% (72/144 sessions used Twining). Non-engagement flagged for: baseline, shared-markdown.

power_analysis.verdict: effect (d=2.41) is below detectable threshold (MDES=3.07) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect
effect (d=2.76) is below detectable threshold (MDES=3.07) — inconclusive, not evidence of no effect

at_5_iterations.note: Going from 3→5 iterations costs ~66% more but detects medium effects (d≈0.6) at 80% power

harness_summary.headline: shared-markdown ranks #1 with 88.1 composite but lift is not statistically significant (need more runs)

items.message: Fix activation: Twining engagement rate is 0% for baseline — agents aren't using coordination tools
Fix activation: Twining engagement rate is 0% for shared-markdown — agents aren't using coordination tools
Broken scorer: dimension 'finalQuality' has zero variance (always 100) — fix or remove
No statistically significant coordination lift detected — coordination tools may not be providing measurable value
At 3 iterations/pair (n=3/condition), only large effects (d≥3.1) are detectable. At 5 iterations/pair, MDES drops to d≥2.0 — a ~66% cost increase for medium-effect detection
Insensitive scorer: dimension 'cumulativeRework' has only 2.7-point spread across conditions
Insensitive scorer: dimension 'finalQuality' has only 0.0-point spread across conditions
High scorer variance (CV>20%) in 3 scenario x condition pairs for dimensions: assumptionHandling, decisionConsistency
Inconclusive comparisons (full-twining, twining-lite): observed effects are below detectable threshold — cannot distinguish from noise at current sample size
Escalating cost in 'sprint-simulation' x 'full-twining': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.039)
Escalating cost in 'sprint-simulation' x 'shared-markdown': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.033)
Escalating cost in 'sprint-simulation' x 'twining-lite': cost increases across sessions (slope=0.033)
